title: Mace PVP Enhanced
description: A Modpack which focuses on improving the aspects of Mace PVP
body:
Mace PVP Enhanced is a Modpack whitch focuses on improving many importent aspects of Mace but also generall PVP. It does so, by improving your Framerate, aswell as the animations.

It also makes you better at PVP, by displaying valuble information, like how many Totems you have, if your opponents Shield is disabled... It also does so, by reducing the size of overlays that are just annoying like the fire.

In the End. It is a Modpack, which has every Mod you've ever needed for PVP.
